name: Audio Processor
description: Prepare recordings for analysis with resampling, normalization, channel conversion, silence trimming, loudness adjustment, and clipping checks.

params.label: Target Sample Rate
params.description: Resample audio to this rate in Hz. 16000 is a good default for speech and lightweight classification.

params.label: Channels
params.description: Convert to mono, stereo, or keep the original channel layout.

params.label: Normalize Peaks
params.description: Scale the waveform so the loudest sample reaches the selected peak target.

params.label: Peak Target
params.description: Maximum absolute amplitude after peak normalization.

params.label: Loudness Target dB
params.description: Approximate RMS loudness target. Used when volume normalization is enabled.

params.label: Normalize Volume
params.description: Apply RMS-based gain after resampling and channel conversion.

params.label: Trim Silence
params.description: Remove quiet leading and trailing sections while preserving a short safety margin.

params.label: Silence Threshold dB
params.description: Samples quieter than this relative threshold are considered silence.

params.label: Output Format
params.description: File format for the processed waveform.
